name: Odd Machines VR: Escape The Temple

reviews.review_description: Cannot change the pie map hard to grab anything without fat fingering.  If u can fix it u should because it's pretty cool otherwise

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback, really appreciated. Feel free to get in touch at https://xsgames.co with more details, I'll be glad to help

reviews.review_description: Hands will not grab anything. Waste of money

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback, hands can grab only certain items that are useful to solve some puzzles

reviews.review_description: If you like puzzle game, this is for you. Plenty of fun solving puzzle on weird machines, interesting concept. Technically good , worth the money

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback, glad you liked this escape room game! Check out more stuff at https://xsgames.co for more fun ;)

reviews.review_title: Exactly what I was looking for
reviews.review_description: This one ticks all the boxes. I just did the first machine puzzle and had a great time doing it. The game forces you into the problem solving process, and tune out the world around you. Once I started I did not want to stop. Very well done.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback, happy you like this puzzle game! Check out more stuff at https://xsgames.co for more fun ;)

reviews.review_description:
You start in a room with 1 machine.
That 1 machine can hide so many puzzles….

I have unlocked the first 3 rooms now. 
The maze in the 1st room, took a lot of time for me, but I did it 💪.

If you think it is easy, it is not…

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review, really appreciated!

reviews.review_description: It looks very simple but you really have to think and look very good. That is what makes this games good to play.  The puzzles are well created and with lots of surprising elements.

developer_response.body: That's for your feedback, happy you liked this puzzle game!
